alerts.analysis: Strong momentum in commodities. Position well above SMA20, trend intact. Inflation hedge working as expected.
European equities under pressure. Broke below SMA20. Position from Friday now at -3.17% loss. Approaching but NOT at 5% stop-loss threshold.

decision.reasoning: FEZ at -3.17% is concerning but within risk tolerance. Stop-loss at 5% not triggered. PDBC rally is favorable - commodities hedging equity weakness. Intraday movements not extreme enough to override daily strategy. Major rebalancing decision deferred to 22:30 UTC as per systematic rules.
decision.warning: If FEZ reaches -4.5%, trigger emergency review before daily close
